news.title: Gold futures rise to Rs 1.50 lakh/10g ahead of US Fed policy decision
news.description: Gold prices inched higher to Rs 1.50 lakh per 10 grams in futures trade on Wednesday as investors turned cautious ahead of the US Federal Reserve's policy decision.

news.title: What’s driving gold near ₹1.5 lakh, silver’s drop?
news.description: Gold and silver prices came under pressure on Wednesday as rising crude oil prices and increased expectations of a US interest rate hike dampened sentiment across precious metals.
